## Snowflake Expands into Chile and Adds IDI Data to Its Marketplace

Marketplace ecosystem growth and international reach expansion are directionally consistent with the SNOW platform-stickiness thesis; incremental in isolation but meaningful as proof points if the cadence of marketplace additions continues.

- SNOW is entering Chile, extending its international geographic footprint.
- IDI data has been added to the Snowflake marketplace, broadening available data products.
- Both moves are incremental execution steps consistent with SNOW's data cloud and marketplace flywheel strategy.
- No revenue impact, customer count, or deal terms are cited in the headline.
